headline: EMCOR Group (EME) Was Dropped From Key Russell Indexes. What It Means
summary: EMCOR Group (NYSE:EME) was removed from multiple Russell indexes, including the Russell 2500 and Russell 1000 Value, effective June 27, 2026. The changes affect the stock's presence across several Russell benchmarks that many institutions track. Index removals can influence ownership patterns, liquidity, and how some investors access the stock. EMCOR Group enters this index reshuffle after a strong multi year share price run, with the stock up 27.5% year to date and 52.5% over the past 12...
